assistant_summary: {"mode":"workstream","lane_count":2,"lanes":[{"lane_id":"workstream-1","title":"Primary Documentation Entry Point And Review Outcome","summary":"Owns the user-facing README refresh and the explicit documentation review report. This lane verifies README claims against source-of-truth files without editing source code, then records changes, evidence, unresolved gaps, and the documentation-only scope result.","owned_files":["README.md","docs/documentation-review.md"],"allowed_touch_points":["CHANGELOG.md","ROADMAP.md","CLAUDE.md","AGENTS.md"],"dependencies":[],"optional":false,"acceptance_criteria_slice":["AC-1","AC-2","AC-4","AC-5"],"verification_hints":["rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"0.9.3\" README.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"docs/spec.md\" docs/documentation-review.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"No source-code behavior changes\" docs/documentation-review.md"],"conflict_risks":["README.md is a likely shared conceptual surface for release-state, workflow, and architecture claims; keep this lane as sole owner for README edits.","Supporting docs lane may uncover stale facts that need to be reflected in README; coordinate through notes or narrow touch points rather than editing README from both lanes.","docs/documentation-review.md should record final evidence after supporting docs are complete, but it can be drafted independently and finalized after workstream-2 lands."]},{"lane_id":"workstream-2","title":"Supporting Specs And Guidance Schema","summary":"Owns stale supporting documentation updates: refresh docs/spec.md current-state claims, add the missing guidance-schema reference, and make only narrow consistency fixes in existing process docs when current evidence contradicts them.","owned_files":["docs/spec.md","docs/guidance-schema.md","docs/decisions_outcomes.md","docs/adr/README.md"],"allowed_touch_points":["AGENTS.md","CLAUDE.md","ROADMAP.md","CHANGELOG.md","docs/documentation-review.md"],"dependencies":[],"optional":false,"acceptance_criteria_slice":["AC-2","AC-3","AC-5"],"verification_hints":["rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"SCHEMA_VERSION = 14\" docs/spec.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"OMX:RUNTIME\" docs/guidance-schema.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"OMX:TEAM:WORKER\" docs/guidance-schema.md"],"conflict_risks":["docs/spec.md refresh may reveal additional stale claims beyond schema and MCP surface; capture unresolved scope in docs/documentation-review.md rather than broadening into source changes.","AGENTS.md already references docs/guidance-schema.md; prefer satisfying the reference by adding the new file instead of editing AGENTS.md unless wording is directly inconsistent.","ROADMAP.md and CHANGELOG.md are release-state evidence sources; avoid moving Unreleased or planned v0.10.0 material into shipped-current wording."]}]}
